name: Elite Aura
description: Experience the ultimate blend of modern elegance and Arabian tradition. This long-lasting fragrance (10–12+ hours) combines rich oud, delicate rose, and exotic spices with contemporary Western notes, creating a sophisticated scent that captivates and lingers. Perfect for both day and evening wear, it exudes luxury and confidence.
features: Elegant blend of Arabian oud, rose, and exotic spices
Modern Western sensibilities for contemporary style
Suitable for day and evening wear
